maragoli: nameganyia imigadi
english: and broke the bread

maragoli: Daudi viitu
english: Daudi our

english: The Lord was with Joseph so that he prospered.

maragoli: Mwana wa Adamu nu Mwami wi Lisabato kandi
english: The Son of Man is Lord even of the Sabbath

maragoli: Nyasaye agaasizi uvwami vwa Baba wiitu Daudi uvuzaa.
english: Blessed is the coming kingdom of our father David!

maragoli: Inzi nangolendi!
english: The boy isn't there! Where can I turn now?

maragoli: Si ulavoola uvudamanu ku mwamihi wa avandu vovo mba.
english: Do not speak evil about the ruler of your people.

maragoli: izingulu ziituli kuye
english: power had gone out from him

maragoli: Ku lidiku lie Lisabato, yaatanga kwigiza mu lisinagogi
english: On the Sabbath day he began to teach in the synagogue

maragoli: Yohana yabatizaa na amazi, navuzwa mulabatizwa mu Roho Mutakatifu.
english: John baptized with water, but you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit.

maragoli: mutumikiri weve
english: his servant

maragoli: Kokosola kutura ku avasigu viitu.
english: To deliver us from the hands of our enemies.

maragoli: Mukali uyu yadira kunguvu ya Yeso
english: The woman touched Jesus's garment

maragoli: Yeso yatura ho kandi, nazia mu kivala cha Tiro na Sidoni
english: Jesus left and went to the region of Tyre and Sidon

maragoli: Ivi unyala kulia ku makuyu gi misaala josi ju mu mulimi.
english: You are free to eat from any tree in the garden.

maragoli: Ulwa yalora Yeso nakikiri ihale
english: When he saw Jesus from a distance

maragoli: Vagenya ku lilindagilira lilie mu Litembeli.
english: They wondered why he was spending such a long time in the Temple.

maragoli: kigira vaali kuli amagondi gataali nu mwayi
english: because they were like sheep without a shepherd

maragoli: Vamuvolera goosi aga vaali nivakoli kandi aga vigiza
english: They told him everything they had done and taught

maragoli: Vuli muyaayi oveeye na madiku munane kuduuka akevwe.
english: Every male among you shall be circumcised when he is eight days old.

maragoli: ilisuuvira linene
english: great faith

maragoli: nivamugingi
english: and they carried him

maragoli: Lwa Yeso yaali namali kwambuka kandi ni liato ku lwangereka lundi lwinyanza
english: When Jesus had crossed again in the boat to the other side of the lake

maragoli: Avandu yava vakuhambika malwa mahia!
english: They have had too much wine!

maragoli: navavererera kigira uvudinyu vwi mioyo jaavo
english: and was grieved at the hardness of their hearts

maragoli: keveeye livikwa harara lia miigizu gi liiva
english: was given great themes of wisdom and knowledge

maragoli: aviigi veve vaamulonda
english: his disciples followed him

maragoli: Yaazizagilira komoloma nu vuluviliri nu kuguuta Vayuda imbiri wa avandu, navamanyia kuvitira mu Mang'oda Matakatifu ndi Yeso aveeye Mesia.
english: He vigorously refuted his Jewish opponents in public debate, proving from the Scriptures that Jesus was the Messiah.

maragoli: Mulindi!
english: Watch!

maragoli: Yavavolera vahe mukaana oyo ichukulia
english: He told them to give the girl something to eat

maragoli: mweli gwa sita
english: sixth month

maragoli: Munyi ava amagoti gadinya! Mioyo jinyu na amatu ginyu gaveeye kuli aga yavo avatamanyi Nyasaye.
english: You stiff-necked people! Your hearts and ears are still uncircumcised.

maragoli: Munyi mwosi mumbulirizi, ma mumanyirize
english: Listen to me all of you and understand

maragoli: Inzi mbeeye ahimbi kukuza, navuzwa muviri gwange mulamenya harara na vaguuga vange.
english: I am about to be gathered to my people. Bury me with my fathers.

maragoli: Usuuviri Mwami Yeso, na ivi ulahonywa harara navinyumba yooyo vosi.
english: Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will be saved — you and your household.

maragoli: Ekeveeye ichangu ni kiliha?
english: Which is easier?

maragoli: Avandu vosi vakwenyaa.
english: Everyone is looking for you.

maragoli: Zihiiri ziosi zilakandeve nizigasiza kuli ndagasiza visukululwi vivio.
english: Through your offspring all nations on earth will be blessed.

maragoli: vidinyirizaa mu Iikuva zana hakekeke vuzwa
english: they quickly fall away from the word

english: I have declared to both Jews and Greeks that they must turn to God in repentance and have faith in our Lord Jesus.

maragoli: Nivukalaki kunyi kwita amwavo wiitu nukuvisa likuza lilie?
english: What will we gain if we kill our brother and cover up his blood?

maragoli: iwaini yeyo harara nizimuya zie visero zana zilafuduka
english: the wine and the old wineskins will both burst

english: I will not drink again of the fruit of the vine until that day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God.

maragoli: Mwaza vugilira kihanwa cha inzi mali kokoletera. Nyasaye yaali ni zimbavasi ku inzi.
english: Please accept the present that was brought to you, for God has been gracious to me.

english: Take your son, your only son, whom you love — Isaac — and go to the region of Moriah.

maragoli: Kuduuka kutie Nyasaye, kuvita kutia avandu.
english: We must obey God rather than human beings!

maragoli: Nyasaye umali kunduliza muzisoni.
english: God has taken away my disgrace.

maragoli: vaafudura igulu winyumba ha Yeso yali
english: they dug through the roof where Jesus was

maragoli: Vosi vizura Roho Mutakatifu, kandi ni vatanga komoloma mu zinimi zindi.
english: All of them were filled with the Holy Spirit and began to speak in other tongues.

maragoli: Uladiviza vadamanu harara na valungi?
english: Will you sweep away the righteous with the wicked?

maragoli: Inzi mbeeye Gabirieli usingiraa imbiri wa Nyasaye.
english: I am Gabriel, I stand in the presence of God.

maragoli: Nivwaha udiiyi kunguvu yange?
english: Who touched my clothes?

maragoli: Vavungiza amadonye mu vihinda likomi na viviri nivizuuyi
english: They filled twelve baskets full

maragoli: Wiviki likoti liilio, ononde.
english: Wrap your cloak around you and follow me.

english: the young ones / youth

english: If I find fifty righteous people in the city of Sodom, I will spare the whole place for their sake.

english: to touch him

english: they were terrified and asked each other

english: Zakaria my

english: You see the crowd pressing against you and yet you ask 'Who touched me?'

english: A large crowd of people followed him

english: How can I understand unless someone explains it to me?

maragoli: Likhuwa liwololo likhusinjia obukali
english: A soft answer turneth away wrath

maragoli: Gave ku inzi kuli aga ovooye.
english: May it happen to me as you have said.

english: Immediately Zechariah was able to speak again.

english: Do you understand what you are reading?

english: Why are you just standing there looking at each other?

english: Listen

english: How many loaves do you have? Go and see

english: they anointed with oil

maragoli: Inyima

english: As for Sarai your wife, you are no longer to call her Sarai; her name will be Sarah.

english: in groups of hundreds and groups of fifties

english: Some fell on good soil

english: Honor your father and your mother

english: when disaster comes upon you I will laugh

english: Let me remain here as my lord's slave in place of the boy.

english: he met a man coming from the tombs

maragoli: Yiviiki zinguvu ni vilato vivio.
english: Put on your clothes and sandals.

english: Now I am ready to die, since I have seen for myself that you are still alive.

maragoli: imbuza yakiring'ana
english: the wind calmed / died down

english: A faithful friend is a strong defense

english: his mat / his bed

english: Silver or gold I do not have, but what I do have I give you. In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, walk!

english: Whoever welcomes one of these little children in my name welcomes me.

english: The Lord has seen my misery. Surely my husband will love me now.

english: They do not eat anything from the market unless they first wash it

english: they ran throughout that whole region

english: twelve baskets

english: whom he named 'Apostles'

english: Should we go and spend two hundred silver coins on bread to feed them?

maragoli: Umundu uyu amolomaa ndi kigira ki?

english: It is not good for the man to be alone. I will make a helper suitable for him.

maragoli: dimbidi

english: So if God gave them the same gift he gave us who believed in the Lord Jesus Christ, who was I to think that I could stand in God's way?

english: He begged Jesus repeatedly not to send the demons out of that region

english: Gabirieli our

maragoli: ni vaavaka avalwaye avanyingi amaguta nu kuvahonyia
english: and anointed many sick people with oil and healed them

english: Aburahamu our

english: A very large crowd gathered around him

english: A crowd of people was sitting around him

maragoli: Muzie musingiri mu Litembeli muvoolere avandu amakuva goosi gi livamwoyo lihia yili.

english: Come let us ambush someone and kill them

english: Go home to your own people

english: Since God has made all this known to you, there is no one so discerning and wise as you.

english: I am ready not only to be bound, but also to die in Jerusalem for the name of the Lord Jesus.

maragoli: liegiza lilahi
english: good instruction / sound teaching

maragoli: vanzizominya na makuva ameere
english: they honor me with their lips / words only

english: Jesus left the region of Tyre and went through Sidon

maragoli: Nyasaye wa vaguuga vange Aburahamu, na Isaka vatumikira, yaanza ugasizi avayaayi yava!
english: May the God before whom my fathers Abraham and Isaac walked, the God who has been my shepherd all my life, bless these boys!

english: people would bring the sick to the marketplaces

maragoli: imigadi

maragoli: Utatia mba

maragoli: Sabeti vavo
english: Sabeti their

maragoli: Kovoolera uwafogoya, 'Usamihiywi uvwoni vuvwo'
english: To say to the paralyzed man, 'Your sins are forgiven'

english: Let the children eat first; it is not right to take the children's food and throw it to the dogs

english: knowing he was a righteous and holy man

english: and said 'Be quiet! Be still!'

maragoli: Henza amazi ngaga yaaha, ni kindu ki ikinzigalira mburi kubatizwa?
english: Look, here is water. What can stand in the way of my being baptized?

maragoli: amafa gaviruka, ni gavumiina
english: the thorns grew up and choked it

english: he went away and began to tell his story in the Decapolis

maragoli: Umali kogeniha kandi ohonyi avandu veve.

english: who gives him power to drive them out
